description: Contract for a deterministic operator proof console report generated from the proof lane manifest, proof status snapshot, and validation frontier ledger.

fail_closed_conditions.description: Every lane row must classify the latest known status using allowed_lane_statuses.
A red or blocked row must carry a fresh generated_at timestamp and first_failure file/line evidence.
The report must reject claims broader than the manifest lane coverage or explicit_not_covered text.
Every rch outcome must map to allowed_rch_outcome_classes before the report can pass.
The report must carry source artifact hashes for the manifest, snapshot, and validation frontier ledger.
The report must not expose unredacted Agent Mail bodies, local home paths, or shell transcripts with secrets.

operator_verdicts.allowed_when: All required fields are present, all rows are classified, and no fail_closed_conditions are active.
Any required field, row classification, freshness, unsupported claim, or redaction condition fails.
All rows are classified but the correct operator action is to hold because no safe proof lane can currently establish the claim.

proof_commands: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_console_report_contract -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract --test proof_status_snapshot_contract -- --nocapture
